info.name: Stock Market Simulator – Extended Test Suite
info.description: Comprehensive coverage — every endpoint tested multiple times. Run folders 1→14 in order.

item.name: POST /stocks – set PLACEHOLDER:99 (will be replaced next call)
GET /stocks – main stocks present, PLACEHOLDER gone (replace semantics verified)

exec: pm.test('ST_ALPHA qty 10', () => { var s = stocks.find(x => x.name==='ST_ALPHA'); pm.expect(s).to.exist; pm.expect(s.quantity).to.equal(10); });
pm.test('ST_BETA qty 5', () => { var s = stocks.find(x => x.name==='ST_BETA'); pm.expect(s).to.exist; pm.expect(s.quantity).to.equal(5); });
pm.test('ST_GAMMA qty 3', () => { var s = stocks.find(x => x.name==='ST_GAMMA'); pm.expect(s).to.exist; pm.expect(s.quantity).to.equal(3); });
pm.test('ST_DELTA qty 1', () => { var s = stocks.find(x => x.name==='ST_DELTA'); pm.expect(s).to.exist; pm.expect(s.quantity).to.equal(1); });
pm.test('PLACEHOLDER not in bank (replace semantics)', () => { var found = stocks.some(x => x.name==='PLACEHOLDER'); pm.expect(found).to.be.false; });

item.name: GET /stocks – bank is empty after empty-array call
POST /stocks – restore main bank after validation tests
GET /stocks – ST_ALPHA decremented to 8 after 2 buys

exec: pm.test('ST_ALPHA qty 8', () => { var s = pm.response.json().stocks.find(x => x.name==='ST_ALPHA'); pm.expect(s).to.exist; pm.expect(s.quantity).to.equal(8); });

item.name: GET /wallets/w-one – created with ST_ALPHA:2 and ST_BETA:1

exec: pm.test('ST_ALPHA qty 2', () => { var s = pm.response.json().stocks.find(x => x.name==='ST_ALPHA'); pm.expect(s).to.exist; pm.expect(s.quantity).to.equal(2); });
pm.test('ST_BETA qty 1', () => { var s = pm.response.json().stocks.find(x => x.name==='ST_BETA'); pm.expect(s).to.exist; pm.expect(s.quantity).to.equal(1); });
pm.test('ST_DELTA depleted (0 or absent)', () => { var s = pm.response.json().stocks.find(x => x.name==='ST_DELTA'); pm.expect(!s || s.quantity === 0).to.be.true; });

item.name: GET /stocks – ST_ALPHA back to 9 after 3 buys + 2 sells

exec: pm.test('ST_ALPHA qty 9', () => { var s = pm.response.json().stocks.find(x => x.name==='ST_ALPHA'); pm.expect(s).to.exist; pm.expect(s.quantity).to.equal(9); });

item.name: w-one sells ST_DELTA → 200 (returns what was bought from drained bank)
w-two sells ST_ALPHA (qty 0 after prior sell) → 400
w-one sells ST_BETA (qty 0 after prior sell) → 400
w-three sells ST_GAMMA (qty 0 after prior sell) → 400
w-four sells ST_ALPHA (fresh wallet, never bought) → 400
9 · Bank State – Exact Verification After All Trades
GET /stocks – verify exact quantities (buy/sell math correct)

exec: pm.test('ST_ALPHA qty 9 (10 - 3buys + 2sells)', () => { var s = stocks.find(x => x.name==='ST_ALPHA'); pm.expect(s).to.exist; pm.expect(s.quantity).to.equal(9); });
pm.test('ST_BETA qty 4 (5 - 2buys + 1sell)', () => { var s = stocks.find(x => x.name==='ST_BETA'); pm.expect(s).to.exist; pm.expect(s.quantity).to.equal(4); });
pm.test('ST_GAMMA qty 3 (3 - 1buy + 1sell)', () => { var s = stocks.find(x => x.name==='ST_GAMMA'); pm.expect(s).to.exist; pm.expect(s.quantity).to.equal(3); });
pm.test('ST_DELTA qty 1 (1 - 1buy + 1sell)', () => { var s = stocks.find(x => x.name==='ST_DELTA'); pm.expect(s).to.exist; pm.expect(s.quantity).to.equal(1); });

item.name: GET /wallets/w-one – has only ST_ALPHA:1 (sold BETA and DELTA)

exec: pm.test('ST_ALPHA qty 1', () => { var s = pm.response.json().stocks.find(x => x.name==='ST_ALPHA'); pm.expect(s).to.exist; pm.expect(s.quantity).to.equal(1); });
pm.test('ST_BETA not returned (qty 0, filtered)', () => { var s = pm.response.json().stocks.find(x => x.name==='ST_BETA'); pm.expect(!s || s.quantity === 0).to.be.true; });

item.name: GET /wallets/w-two – has only ST_BETA:1 (bought ALPHA then sold it)

exec: pm.test('ST_BETA qty 1', () => { var s = pm.response.json().stocks.find(x => x.name==='ST_BETA'); pm.expect(s).to.exist; pm.expect(s.quantity).to.equal(1); });
pm.test('ST_ALPHA not returned (sold all)', () => { var s = pm.response.json().stocks.find(x => x.name==='ST_ALPHA'); pm.expect(!s || s.quantity === 0).to.be.true; });

item.name: GET /wallets/w-three – exists but stocks empty (bought and sold all)

exec: pm.test('stocks list has no positive quantities', () => { var positive = pm.response.json().stocks.filter(x => x.quantity > 0); pm.expect(positive.length).to.equal(0); });

item.name: w-one/ST_BETA → 0 (sold all; known stock returns 0, not 404)
w-four/ST_ALPHA → 0 (never bought; known stock, so 0 not 404)
w-never-created/ST_ALPHA → 0 (wallet absent but stock is known)
12 · Complex Lifecycle – Buy 3×, Sell 2×, Verify State

exec: pm.test('ST_COMPLEX qty 2', () => { var s = pm.response.json().stocks.find(x => x.name==='ST_COMPLEX'); pm.expect(s).to.exist; pm.expect(s.quantity).to.equal(2); });
pm.test('ST_COMPLEX qty 1', () => { var s = pm.response.json().stocks.find(x => x.name==='ST_COMPLEX'); pm.expect(s).to.exist; pm.expect(s.quantity).to.equal(1); });
pm.test('ST_COMPLEX qty 4', () => { var s = pm.response.json().stocks.find(x => x.name==='ST_COMPLEX'); pm.expect(s).to.exist; pm.expect(s.quantity).to.equal(4); });

item.name: GET /log – all successful ops logged, failed ops excluded

exec: pm.test('buy w-one ST_ALPHA logged twice', () => { var n = log.filter(x => x.type==='buy' && x.wallet_id==='w-one' && x.stock_name==='ST_ALPHA').length; pm.expect(n).to.equal(2); });
pm.test('buy w-one ST_BETA logged', () => { pm.expect(log.find(x => x.type==='buy' && x.wallet_id==='w-one' && x.stock_name==='ST_BETA')).to.exist; });
pm.test('buy w-one ST_DELTA logged', () => { pm.expect(log.find(x => x.type==='buy' && x.wallet_id==='w-one' && x.stock_name==='ST_DELTA')).to.exist; });
pm.test('buy w-two ST_ALPHA logged', () => { pm.expect(log.find(x => x.type==='buy' && x.wallet_id==='w-two' && x.stock_name==='ST_ALPHA')).to.exist; });
pm.test('buy w-two ST_BETA logged', () => { pm.expect(log.find(x => x.type==='buy' && x.wallet_id==='w-two' && x.stock_name==='ST_BETA')).to.exist; });
pm.test('buy w-three ST_GAMMA logged', () => { pm.expect(log.find(x => x.type==='buy' && x.wallet_id==='w-three' && x.stock_name==='ST_GAMMA')).to.exist; });
pm.test('sell w-one ST_ALPHA logged', () => { pm.expect(log.find(x => x.type==='sell' && x.wallet_id==='w-one' && x.stock_name==='ST_ALPHA')).to.exist; });
pm.test('sell w-two ST_ALPHA logged', () => { pm.expect(log.find(x => x.type==='sell' && x.wallet_id==='w-two' && x.stock_name==='ST_ALPHA')).to.exist; });
pm.test('sell w-one ST_BETA logged', () => { pm.expect(log.find(x => x.type==='sell' && x.wallet_id==='w-one' && x.stock_name==='ST_BETA')).to.exist; });
pm.test('sell w-three ST_GAMMA logged', () => { pm.expect(log.find(x => x.type==='sell' && x.wallet_id==='w-three' && x.stock_name==='ST_GAMMA')).to.exist; });
pm.test('sell w-one ST_DELTA logged', () => { pm.expect(log.find(x => x.type==='sell' && x.wallet_id==='w-one' && x.stock_name==='ST_DELTA')).to.exist; });
pm.test('buy w-cx ST_COMPLEX logged 3 times', () => { var n = log.filter(x => x.type==='buy' && x.wallet_id==='w-cx' && x.stock_name==='ST_COMPLEX').length; pm.expect(n).to.equal(3); });
pm.test('sell w-cx ST_COMPLEX logged 2 times', () => { var n = log.filter(x => x.type==='sell' && x.wallet_id==='w-cx' && x.stock_name==='ST_COMPLEX').length; pm.expect(n).to.equal(2); });
pm.test('GHOST_X not in log (failed buy/sell)', () => { pm.expect(log.filter(x => x.stock_name==='GHOST_X').length).to.equal(0); });
pm.test('w-four not in log (all sells failed)', () => { pm.expect(log.filter(x => x.wallet_id==='w-four').length).to.equal(0); });

item.name: GET /stocks – HA: another instance responds after 1st kill

exec: pm.test('200 OK – another instance responded', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));

item.name: GET /stocks – HA: third instance still serves after 2 kills

exec: pm.test('200 OK – third instance responded', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
